opinion.h: CERTIORARI TO THE CIRCUIT COURT OF APPEALS
opinion.p: Decided on the authority of Hendrickson v. Apperson, ante, 245 U. S. 105.

The essential questions involved in these cases are the same as those considered and decided in No. 427, ante, 245 U. S. 105. The judgment of the circuit court of appeals in each of them is accordingly
